name: great-marketers
description: Eight advertising/marketing personas (Ogilvy, Bernbach, Wells Lawrence, Clow, Reeves, Lansdowne Resor, Barton, Sutherland) + four MVP skills for positioning, copy, and launch composition. Drafted via cross-plugin orchestration with great-authors writers. v0.1 MVP.

plugins.name: great-marketers
plugins.description: Eight advertising/marketing personas + four operational skills (marketers-channel, marketers-project-init, marketers-write-positioning, marketers-write-launch-copy). Companion to great-minds, great-authors, great-filmmakers, great-publishers. For Claude Code.

plugins.name: great-marketers-dxt
plugins.description: Same personas and skills as great-marketers, packaged as a Claude Desktop extension. Build: cd distribution/dxt && npm install && npx @anthropic-ai/dxt pack
